title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeMemAboutToChange: Assertion `(mFlags&MEM_Real)==0 || pMem->u.r==pX->u.r' failed (2)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, c1 DECIMAL(10, 2) CHECK(c1 >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, c1 INT, FOREIGN KEY (c1) REFERENCES t1(c0) ON DELETE CASCADE);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1) VALUES('test1', 1), ('test2', NULL);
key_bug_features: REPLACE INTO with foreign keys and CHECK constraint
